creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
To simplify japanese/kinput2-* variants, I would like to get a
	repo-copy of japanese/kinput2-freewnn -> japanese/kinput2.
	After the repo-copy I will remove japanese/kinput2-* and merge
	necessary changes from them to japanese/kinput2.
